calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Charles Drexler appearing in person for and with Bryan Veal and Victor Veal (administrators).
Jason Ross appearing via zoom for and with Ulanda Veal and Karla Veal (beneficiaries).

Discussion was held that a $200,000.00 disbursement was made without Court approval, that cash in the amount of $475,000.00 was now placed into two separate accounts one in Mechanics bank and the other in Bridge bank, that Bryan Veal was paid $2,250.00 per month to manage estate properties and that all parties agree of the amended approval of the final distribution. Amended first and final account and report etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Chavez. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Drexler, for Bryan Veal and Victor Veal, Personal Representatives; Constance Figuers, for Probate Advance, LLC, Assignee; Ryutaro Hirota, for Keiko Kanezaki, Objector; Ulanda Veal, via Zoom, in propria persona, Beneficiary.

Mr. Drexler reports of settlement discussions with Mr. Hirota and summarizes those discussions. Mr. Hirota offers testimony regarding the settlement discussions with Mr. Drexler and The court confirms that a distribution of more than $17k that was made without court approval and that it appears as though the instant petition was filed in order to retroactively approve the unauthorized distribution. Mr. Drexler advises that he intends to reference the unauthorized distribution in a pending first and final accounting. Ms. Veal confirms receiving a distribution of $50k and confirms that she received via cash payment from Probate Advance via an assignment of which a Notice of Assignment was filed with the court on May-18-20222. The court confirms with Mr. Drexler that it has the most recent proposed order regarding the instant petition.

After additional discussion, the court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
